ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Short description or blurb of the project */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal set by the project creator */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Amount of money pledged by backers */,
  "outcomes" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for funding */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the funding campaign */,
  "launched_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was launched */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the project is a staff pick */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers supporting the project */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the project is in the spotlight */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the project */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the project */,
  "percentage_funded" REAL /* Percentage of the funding goal that has been met */,
  "average_donation" REAL /* Average donation amount from backers */,
  "date_created_conversion" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created (converted to a common timezone) */,
  "date_ended_conversion" TEXT /* Date and time when the project ended (converted to a common timezone) */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project creator */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., live, suspended, completed) */,
  "funding_model" TEXT /* Funding model used (e.g., all-or-nothing, flexible) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Detailed location (city, state) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the project */,
  "rewards_description" TEXT /* Description of the rewards offered to backers */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the project video */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the project has received */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the project has been shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer, admin) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is based */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user registered */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "newsletter_subscription" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is subscribed to the platform's newsletter */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_backers" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being backed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user backing the project */,
  "pledge_amount" REAL /* Amount of money pledged by the backer */,
  "backed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the backer pledged */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward associated with the pledge */,
  "anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the backer wishes to remain anonymous */,
  "reward_delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the reward delivery (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the update is for */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the update */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the update */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the update was published */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project creator who published the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update (e.g., news, announcement, thank you) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image associated with the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the image belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_images_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if this is a reply) */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES project_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
